archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) with a Luxury Twist
rationale: The user requested a premium wedding studio feel with a warm champagne and mocha palette. This fits Archetype 1's organic warmth paired with Archetype 5's editorial luxury. We prioritize trust, elegance, and visual storytelling.

rules: Headings must use tight tracking (tracking-tight) to feel editorial.
Never center headings by default; use left alignment for strong editorial structure.
Overlines/Labels must be uppercase, tiny, and have wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-light tracking-tighter text-primary
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-normal tracking-tight text-primary
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-accent

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs to evoke luxury.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: MODE A: THE 'TETRIS' GRID (For Marketing/Visuals) using wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Leave breathing room, avoid perfect symmetry.
layout_and_spacing.image_constraints: Mobile Height Limit: Images must not exceed 80vh on mobile.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 ease-out
buttons.secondary: border border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 ease-out

cards.style: Go cardless or use ultra-minimalist rectangular styles with 1px border-border and no shadow. Flat background. Images inside should not have rounded corners (rounded-none) to match the editorial, print-like aesthetic.

header.style: Crystal Glass variant (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) if content scrolls under, or solid if not. 1px delicate inner stroke at the bottom (border-b border-border/40).

icons.style: Thin stroke, minimal, scaled to text size.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Images should have a subtle scale effect on hover (scale-105) inside an overflow-hidden container. Buttons change background opacity and slightly lift.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: Use staggered fade-in up for lists/grids. Lenis smooth scrolling is highly recommended.

page_structure.description: Editorial split layout or bento grid. Huge heading (Cormorant Garamond), champagne silk abstract background, with 'Lihat Vendor' and 'Konsultasi' CTAs.
Text-heavy with elegant typography. 'We craft premium moments.' Pair with a high-fashion detail shot.
Asymmetric bento grid of premium vendors (venues, decorators). Hover to reveal quick details. Minimal UI.
Full-width section with deep mocha background, contrasting white serif typography. Simple form or direct CTA to consultation.

hero_background.description: Abstract warm champagne and mocha silk fabric flowing.

feature_image_1.description: Close up of luxury wedding invitation mockups on mocha paper.

vendor_image_1.description: Elegant wedding venue decoration with warm lighting.

vendor_image_2.description: Wedding dress detail and couple shot.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. E.g., data-testid='cta-lihat-vendor', data-testid='cta-konsultasi'.

instructions_to_main_agent: This web blueprint strictly follows the 'Jewel & Luxury' and 'Organic Earthy' principles with a warm champagne and mocha palette.
Do not use generic Shadcn Cards with heavy shadows. Strip Shadcn component styles to be flat, rectangular (rounded-none), and bordered with 1px solid #E5D3B3.
Ensure the web platform is completely independent visually from the mobile app (React Native) while keeping the brand essence.
Implement 'Lihat Vendor' and 'Konsultasi' explicitly as the main CTAs.
Do NOT center align text arbitrarily. Left alignment builds an editorial tension. Use large paddings (p-12, py-24).
